description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_webapp job using the node:8 image that runs node -v and npm -v in before_script, then executes cd app, npm install --progress=false, npm run build, secsepoch="$(date +'%y')$(date +%m)$(date +%d):$(date +%-H)$(date +%M)" , PACKAGE_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version"), and sed -i -e "s/==GLOBAPPVERSION==/$PACKAGE_VERSION.$secsepoch/g" dist/spa-mat/index.html, and stores app/dist/spa-mat as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a manual deploy_webapp_production job using tetraweb/php:7.1 that prepares ssh-agent, adds $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, sets up known_hosts, installs rsync, then runs ssh -p2022 $SSH_SRV "rm -Rf $SSH_WWW_BASE/appserver/_old_production", ssh -p2022 $SSH_SRV "mkdir -p $SSH_WWW_BASE/appserver/_tmp_production", scp -P2022 -r app/dist/spa-mat/* $SSH_SRV:$SSH_WWW_BASE/appserver/_tmp_production, and ssh -p2022 $SSH_SRV "mv $SSH_WWW_BASE/appserver/production $SSH_WWW_BASE/appserver/_old_production && mv $SSH_WWW_BASE/appserver/_tmp_production $SSH_WWW_BASE/appserver/production", with the same artifact path. Also add a manual deploy_webapp_staging job with the same image and setup that targets the staging environment (URL https://staging.kyani.eu) and uses analogous ssh commands with _staging paths. Both deploy jobs define the appropriate environment and keep the app/dist/spa-mat artifact.
